title: Internal error from Google Sheets API
symptom: The workflow fails with a 500 internal error message, indicating that the request could not be processed.
not_this_if: Error is due to user input or configuration issues
root_cause: An internal error from the Google Sheets API indicates that something went wrong on the server side. This could be due to temporary issues with the API or problems with the request being sent.
fix_steps: Retry the request after a short delay
Check for any issues with the request format or parameters
Monitor the Google Cloud status for any ongoing issues
agent_instruction: Retry the request after a brief wait to see if the issue resolves itself.
